name_cn:
NEVERFULL BB Handbag #️⃣M46705
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to boutique specifications with dynamic chip re-coding. Original factory exclusive fabric, original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color consistent with authentic)
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website latest full gift box!
24 x 14 x 9 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Zipper closure
Interior slip pocket
D-ring with detachable coin purse
Strap: Detachable, adjustable
Drop length: 39.0 cm
Drop length adjustable to: 58.0 cm
Handles: Double handles
Made in France
